name: Sounak Guha
desc:
Computer Science Engineering graduate with 2+ years of hands-on experience in full-stack development, specializing in front-end application design and development. Skilled in building scalable, user-centric web and mobile interfaces, optimizing performance, and ensuring seamless cross-platform integration across enterprise and product environments.
Possesses working experience in backend development, contributing to feature enhancements, bug fixes, and system improvements when required. Strong foundation in system design, analytical thinking, and problem-solving, with a proven ability to translate business requirements into efficient and high-impact software solutions.
Seeking opportunities to contribute to forward-thinking organizations through innovative, scalable, and performance-driven product development.
footerdesc: Every great developer you know got there by solving problems which they were unqualified to solve until they actually did it.
footerslogan: Want to give me an opportunity?
